fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the identifier for the customer posting group. This is what you choose when you assign the group to an entity or document.

fields.name: Receivables Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account to use when you post receivables from customers in this posting group.

fields.name: Service Charge Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account to use when you post service charges for customers in this posting group.

fields.name: Payment Disc. Debit Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account to use when you post payment discounts granted to customers in this posting group.

fields.name: Invoice Rounding Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account to use when you post amounts that result from invoice rounding when you post transactions for customers.

fields.name: Additional Fee Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account to use when you post additional fees from reminders and finance charge memos for customers in this posting group.

fields.name: Interest Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account to use when you post interest from reminders and finance charge memos for customers in this posting group.

fields.name: Debit Curr. Appln. Rndg. Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account to use when you post rounding differences. These differences can occur when you apply entries in different currencies to one another.

fields.name: Credit Curr. Appln. Rndg. Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account to use when you post rounding differences. These differences can occur when you apply entries in different currencies to one another.

fields.name: Debit Rounding Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account to use when you post rounding differences from a remaining amount.

fields.name: Credit Rounding Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account to use when you post rounding differences from a remaining amount.

fields.name: Payment Disc. Credit Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account to use when you post reductions in payment discounts granted to customers in this posting group.

fields.name: Payment Tolerance Debit Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account to use when you post payment tolerance and payments for sales. This applies to this particular combination of business group and product group.

fields.name: Payment Tolerance Credit Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account to use when you post payment tolerance and payments for sales. This applies to this particular combination of business group and product group.

fields.name: Add. Fee per Line Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account that additional fees are posted to.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description for the customer posting group.

fields.name: View All Accounts on Lookup
fields.tooltip: Specifies that all possible accounts are shown when you look up from a field. If the check box is not selected, then only accounts related to the involved account category are shown.
